Professional Lab Technician

Reliable lab support with a focus on precision, safety, and timely results.

Contact Me

Services

Tailored laboratory assistance for clinics, research teams, and small labs.

  • Sample preparation and analysis
  • Equipment calibration and maintenance
  • Data recording and documentation
  • Safety compliance and quality control

Get in touch

© Lab Technician Services

Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. The page is responsive, uses a red/black/white color scheme, includes a hero with title and subtitle, a brief services list, and a contact form that shows an alert on submit (no backend).

Features
- Single HTML page
- Responsive mobile-first layout
- Hero section with title and subtitle
- Services list
- Contact form (name, email, message) that triggers an alert on submit
- Uses only red (#ff0000), black (#000000), and white (#ffffff)

Getting Started
1) Open index.html directly in your browser.
2) Optionally serve locally with any static file server.

Run Tests
- Install dependencies: npm install
- Run tests: npm test

Test Details
- A Jest test checks that index.html contains the exact hero title text: "Professional Lab Technician".

notes: Run `npm install` then `npm test` to execute the Jest test.
Open index.html in a browser to view the landing page.
